title: Excavating and Loading Machine and Dragline Operators, Surface Mining
description: Operate or tend machinery at surface mining site, equipped with scoops, shovels, or buckets to excavate and load loose materials.

tasks.text: Move levers, depress foot pedals, and turn dials to operate power machinery, such as power shovels, stripping shovels, scraper loaders, or backhoes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up or inspect equipment prior to operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Become familiar with digging plans, machine capabilities and limitations, and efficient and safe digging procedures in a given application.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe hand signals, grade stakes, or other markings when operating machines so that work can be performed to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate machinery to perform activities such as backfilling excavations, vibrating or breaking rock or concrete, or making winter roads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Receive written or oral instructions regarding material movement or excavation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move materials over short distances, such as around a construction site, factory, or warehouse.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create or maintain inclines or ramps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lubricate, adjust, or repair machinery and replace parts, such as gears, bearings, or bucket teeth.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Handle slides, mud, or pit cleanings or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct workers engaged in placing blocks or outriggers to prevent capsizing of machines when lifting heavy loads.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure and verify levels of rock or gravel, bases, or other excavated material.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct ground workers engaged in activities such as moving stakes or markers, or changing positions of towers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adjust dig face angles for varying overburden depths and set lengths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform manual labor to prepare or finish sites, such as shoveling materials by hand.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
